meta.composite_note: All composite scores use SUM format (drop hi/lo, sum middle 3 judge totals). Example: Golden Coins 231.5 = 77+77+77.5.
notes: Section 4 (Friday 4/17) now included — final standings with Won USD prize money
Class rosters include all 11 classes: Classic Open L4, L3, L2, L1, PT, Novice Horse Open Derby L4, 4YO Breeder L4, L3, L2, L1, APHA Chrome Cash Open
Horses with status=zero are DQs (off-pattern, zero-scored). They still have maneuver data.
Horses with status=scratch did not compete. j1-j5 and total_sum are null.
Two Show Manager data discrepancies flagged — see meta.known_data_integrity_flags

known_data_integrity_flags.issue: Show Manager Result List displays J=[71,72,71,71,69]→213 for Sections 2-4. Signed Score Sheet PDF shows J=[71,70,69,69.5,68.5]→208.5. ReinStats uses PDF (authoritative). 4.5-point composite discrepancy affects placing.
Show Manager Result List shows Thompson J1=68.5. Signed Score Sheet PDF shows Thompson=69.0. Composite matches (208) either way because Thompson is dropped as low.
known_data_integrity_flags.resolution: Using PDF values (Thompson 69.0), no composite impact

meta.data_philosophy: Scores from authoritative Signed Score Sheet PDFs. Where Show Manager Result Lists conflict, PDFs win.

Thompson.signature_trait: Most generous overall, rewards consistency across the pattern
Thompson.quote_worthy_stat: Most rewarded maneuver: Right Circle at +0.41 average

headline_findings.title: Golden Coins tops the event at 231.5
headline_findings.detail: Kole Price on Golden Coins (EXH 1083) scored 231.5 on a 77.0/77.0/77.5/78.0/76.0 card in Section 2.

headline_findings.title: Judge Luse is the strictest on paper
headline_findings.detail: Van Luse averaged 71.19 across 309 scored rides — the lowest of the five-judge panel. Generosity index: -0.21 vs field.

headline_findings.title: Judge Thompson is most generous
headline_findings.detail: Terry R Thompson averaged 71.63, highest on the panel. Gave 2 Excellent (+1.5) scores and 276 Very Good (+1.0) scores across all 7 maneuvers.

headline_findings.title: Spooks Gotta Whiz dominates by volume
headline_findings.detail: 48 offspring competing at NRBC 2026 Open Classic Prelims — 15.5% of the scored field traces to this sire. Average composite: 214.57.

headline_findings.title: 70 horses competed in both Classic L4 and 4YO Breeder L4
headline_findings.detail: High overlap between Open pro division and 4-year-old breeder class means these horses earned in two classes at once. Top earners here often take home checks from both leaderboards.

headline_findings.title: $438,748.89 in prize money awarded across 11 classes
headline_findings.detail: Complete event payout across Open Classic Prelims. Biggest class purse: 4YO Breeder Open L4 at $123,810.

headline_findings.title: Horse #1136 scorecard vs result list mismatch flagged
headline_findings.detail: CC Rumor Has It shows J=[71,70,69,69½,68½]→208½ on signed judge scorecards. Show Manager's result list displays J=[71,72,71,71,69]→213. ReinStats uses the signed card values — the authoritative source.
